stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You inadvertently set the IRS mode selector from NAV to ATT mode, resulting in loss of alignment in flight. What are the implications of this?

options.a: Groundspeed data is lost, although position information may still be available.
options.b: Navigation data is lost and realignment is NOT possible in flight.
options.c: Attitude data is lost, but realignment is possible in flight.
options.d: Navigation and attitude information is completely lost.
